description: This video explains the principles behind DAO voting as a governance method, emphasizing the role of token ownership in decision-making and the incentives for users to act in the project's best interest.
topic_summary: DAO voting operates on the premise that token ownership grants voting power, incentivizing users to maintain project integrity to protect their investments. The decentralized nature of DAOs empowers users and aligns decision-making with those affected by the outcomes [t=0:08 - t=0:46].
